API docs by Redocly

GraphNode API (0.1.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

Backend API for GraphNode. Errors follow RFC 9457 Problem Details.

User Library

사용자 라이브러리 파일 업로드·조회·AI 요약 등 /v1/files 계열 엔드포인트.

라이브러리 파일 AI 요약 미리보기 (한 줄)

업로드된 사용자 파일의 구조화 요약 중 1번(한 줄 요약)만 반환합니다. summaryStatus가 completed일 때 oneLine이 채워질 수 있습니다.

path Parameters
id
required
string

파일 ID (ULID)

Responses

/v1/files/{id}/summary/preview

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "summaryStatus": "pending",
  • "summaryError": "string",
  • "oneLine": "string"
}

라이브러리 파일 AI 구조화 요약 전체

1~4번 전체(한 줄·목적·핵심 포인트·결론)를 반환합니다. summaryStatus가 completed가 아니면 본문 필드는 null 또는 빈 배열일 수 있습니다.

path Parameters
id
required
string

파일 ID (ULID)

Responses

/v1/files/{id}/summary/full

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "summaryStatus": "pending",
  • "summaryError": "string",
  • "oneLine": "string",
  • "purpose": "string",
  • "keyPoints": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "conclusion": "string"
}

Graph Editor

Direct macro graph editing endpoints for nodes, edges, clusters, subclusters, and best-effort batch operations.

Create a graph editor node

Creates a user-owned macro graph node and links it to an existing cluster. The server assigns the numeric node ID and stores editor-created nodes with an origId using the editor:{userId}:{nodeId} pattern.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
label
required
string [ 1 .. 200 ] characters
summary
string <= 2000 characters
clusterId
required
string non-empty
object (EditorMetadata)

Arbitrary editor metadata. Reserved server-managed keys are not allowed.

sourceType
string
Enum: "chat" "markdown" "notion"
string or null
numMessages
integer >= 0

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/nodes

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "label": "string",
  • "summary": "string",
  • "clusterId": "string",
  • "metadata": { },
  • "sourceType": "chat",
  • "timestamp": "string",
  • "numMessages": 0
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "nodeId": 1,
  • "node": {
    • "id": 0,
    • "userId": "string",
    • "origId": "string",
    • "label": "string",
    • "summary": "string",
    • "metadata": { },
    • "nodeTitle": "string",
    • "clusterId": "string",
    • "clusterName": "string",
    • "timestamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "numMessages": 0,
    • "sourceType": "chat",
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Update a graph editor node

Updates mutable node fields. Use the move-cluster endpoint to change cluster membership.

path Parameters
nodeId
required
integer >= 1
Request Body schema: application/json
required
label
string [ 1 .. 200 ] characters
summary
string <= 2000 characters
object (EditorMetadata)

Arbitrary editor metadata. Reserved server-managed keys are not allowed.

sourceType
string
Enum: "chat" "markdown" "notion"
string or null
numMessages
integer >= 0

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/nodes/{nodeId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "label": "string",
  • "summary": "string",
  • "metadata": { },
  • "sourceType": "chat",
  • "timestamp": "string",
  • "numMessages": 0
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Delete a graph editor node

Soft-deletes the node by default. Set permanent=true for hard delete.

path Parameters
nodeId
required
integer >= 1
query Parameters
permanent
boolean
Default: false

If true, hard-deletes the node and related materialized graph links.

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/nodes/{nodeId}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Move a node to another cluster

Moves a node to the target cluster. If the node belonged to subclusters in a different cluster, those subcluster memberships are removed.

path Parameters
nodeId
required
integer >= 1
Request Body schema: application/json
required
newClusterId
required
string non-empty

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/nodes/{nodeId}/move-cluster

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "newClusterId": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Create a graph editor edge

Creates an insight edge between two existing nodes. relationType is normalized to UPPER_SNAKE_CASE by the backend.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
source
required
integer >= 1
target
required
integer >= 1
weight
number [ 0 .. 1 ]
relationType
string [ 1 .. 100 ] characters

User-facing relation type. The backend normalizes this value to UPPER_SNAKE_CASE.

relation
string <= 200 characters
object (EditorMetadata)

Arbitrary editor metadata. Reserved server-managed keys are not allowed.

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/edges

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "source": 1,
  • "target": 1,
  • "weight": 1,
  • "relationType": "string",
  • "relation": "string",
  • "properties": { }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "edgeId": "string",
  • "edge": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "userId": "string",
    • "source": 0,
    • "target": 0,
    • "weight": 1,
    • "type": "hard",
    • "relationType": "string",
    • "relation": "string",
    • "properties": { },
    • "intraCluster": true,
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Update a graph editor edge

Updates edge weight, relation labels, or custom properties.

path Parameters
edgeId
required
string non-empty
Request Body schema: application/json
required
weight
number [ 0 .. 1 ]
relationType
string [ 1 .. 100 ] characters

User-facing relation type. The backend normalizes this value to UPPER_SNAKE_CASE.

relation
string <= 200 characters
object (EditorMetadata)

Arbitrary editor metadata. Reserved server-managed keys are not allowed.

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/edges/{edgeId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "weight": 1,
  • "relationType": "string",
  • "relation": "string",
  • "properties": { }
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Delete a graph editor edge

Soft-deletes the edge by default. Set permanent=true for hard delete.

path Parameters
edgeId
required
string non-empty
query Parameters
permanent
boolean
Default: false

If true, hard-deletes the edge and materialized graph links.

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/edges/{edgeId}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,

Create a graph editor cluster

Creates an empty cluster. If id is omitted, the backend generates a UUID.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
string [ 1 .. 100 ] characters

Optional client-supplied cluster ID. If omitted, the backend generates a UUID.

name
required
string [ 1 .. 200 ] characters
description
string <= 2000 characters
themes
Array of strings <= 10 items [ items <= 100 characters ]

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/clusters

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "themes": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 409
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "cluster": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "userId": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "size": 0,
    • "themes": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Update a graph editor cluster

Updates cluster display fields. Cluster IDs are immutable.

path Parameters
clusterId
required
string non-empty
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
string [ 1 .. 200 ] characters
description
string <= 2000 characters
themes
Array of strings <= 10 items [ items <= 100 characters ]

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/clusters/{clusterId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",

    • "string"
    ]
}

Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Delete a graph editor cluster

Deletes a cluster. By default, deletion is rejected when the cluster has active nodes. Set cascade=true to delete contained nodes and related edges first. Set permanent=true for hard delete.

path Parameters
clusterId
required
string non-empty
query Parameters
cascade
boolean
Default: false

If true, deletes contained nodes and related edges before deleting the cluster.

permanent
boolean
Default: false

If true, performs hard delete for the cluster and any cascaded graph data.

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/clusters/{clusterId}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 409
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Create a graph editor subcluster

Creates an empty subcluster under an existing cluster.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
string [ 1 .. 100 ] characters

Optional client-supplied subcluster ID. If omitted, the backend generates a UUID.

clusterId
required
string non-empty
topKeywords
Array of strings <= 20 items [ items <= 100 characters ]
density
number [ 0 .. 1 ]

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/subclusters

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "clusterId": "string",
  • "topKeywords": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "density": 1
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 409
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "subcluster": {
    • "id": "string",
    • "userId": "string",
    • "clusterId": "string",
    • "nodeIds": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "representativeNodeId": 0,
    • "size": 0,
    • "density": 1,
    • "topKeywords": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Updates subcluster keywords or density.

path Parameters
subclusterId
required
string non-empty
Request Body schema: application/json
required
topKeywords
Array of strings <= 20 items [ items <= 100 characters ]
density
number [ 0 .. 1 ]

Delete a graph editor subcluster

Deletes a subcluster. Nodes are not deleted; their cluster membership is preserved. Set permanent=true for hard delete.

path Parameters
subclusterId
required
string non-empty
query Parameters
permanent
boolean
Default: false

If true, hard-deletes the subcluster.

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/subclusters/{subclusterId}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Move a subcluster to another cluster

Moves a subcluster to the target cluster and moves contained nodes with it.

path Parameters
subclusterId
required
string non-empty
Request Body schema: application/json
required
newClusterId
required
string non-empty

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/subclusters/{subclusterId}/move-cluster

Add a node to a subcluster

Adds a node to a subcluster. The node and subcluster must belong to the same cluster.

path Parameters
subclusterId
required
string non-empty
Request Body schema: application/json
required
nodeId
required
integer >= 1

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/subclusters/{subclusterId}/nodes

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "nodeId": 1
}

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Remove a node from a subcluster

Removes the subcluster membership only. The node remains in its cluster.

path Parameters
subclusterId
required
string non-empty
nodeId
required
integer >= 1

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/subclusters/{subclusterId}/nodes/{nodeId}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Execute graph editor operations in sequence

Executes up to 100 graph editor operations sequentially. This endpoint is not ACID: it does not wrap the full batch in one transaction and it does not roll back operations that already completed. On the first operation failure, execution stops and the API returns a Problem response; earlier successful operations may already be persisted.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
Array of any (EditorBatchOperation) [ 1 .. 100 ] items

Responses

/v1/graph/editor/transactions

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "operations": [
    • {
      • "type": "createNode",
      • "payload": {
        • "label": "string",
        • "summary": "string",
        • "clusterId": "string",
        • "metadata": { },
        • "sourceType": "chat",
        • "timestamp": "string",
        • "numMessages": 0
        }
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "results": [
    • {
      • "operationIndex": 0,
      • "success": true,
      • "data": null,
      • "error": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "processedCount": 0
}

Agent

AI 에이전트 스트리밍 채팅

사용자 메시지를 기반으로 일반 대화, 요약, 노트 생성을 자동 분류하여 실시간 스트리밍으로 결과를 반환합니다. Accept 헤더가 text/event-stream일 때 SSE 연결을 맺고 status, chunk, result, error 이벤트를 발송합니다.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
userMessage
required
string

사용자 입력 메시지

contextText
string

추가 맥락 텍스트

modeHint
string
Enum: "summary" "note" "auto"

모드 제안 (분류기 참고용)

microscopeGroupId
string

Microscope 워크스페이스 ID (RAG 우선 모드 시 사용)

Responses

/v1/agent/chat/stream

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userMessage": "string",
  • "contextText": "string",
  • "modeHint": "summary",
  • "microscopeGroupId": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Me

현재 로그인 사용자 정보 조회

현재 세션의 사용자 프로필 및 크레딧 잔액(JIT 갱신 후)을 반환합니다. credit 필드는 항상 포함됩니다.

Responses

/v1/me

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "string",
  • "profile": { },
  • "credit": {
    • "balance": 0,
    • "holdAmount": 0,
    • "availableBalance": 0,
    • "planType": "FREE",
    • "cycleStart": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "cycleEnd": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

크레딧 잔액 상세 조회

현재 사용자의 크레딧 잔액을 조회합니다. 구독 주기가 만료된 경우 JIT(Just-In-Time) 갱신이 자동으로 실행됩니다.

Responses

/v1/me/credits

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "balance": 0,
  • "holdAmount": 0,
  • "availableBalance": 0,
  • "planType": "FREE",
  • "cycleStart": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "cycleEnd": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

크레딧 사용 내역 조회

현재 사용자의 크레딧 사용 내역을 최신순으로 페이지네이션 조회합니다.

query Parameters
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20

한 번에 가져올 항목 수 (기본 20, 최대 100)

offset
integer >= 0
Default: 0

건너뛸 항목 수 (기본 0)

Responses

/v1/me/credits/usage

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "feature": "AI_CHAT",
      • "creditUsed": 0,
      • "status": "SUCCESS",
      • "taskId": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "total": 0
}

Search

Integrated keyword search across notes and AI chats

query Parameters
q
required
string

검색할 키워드

Responses

/v1/search

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "notes": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "title": "string",
      • "content": "string",
      • "folderId": "5b6379a4-2a6c-4085-b184-45838a3b8e7e",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "score": 0
      }
    ],
  • "chatThreads": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "title": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "messages": [
        • {
          • "id": "string",
          • "role": "user",
          • "content": "string",
          • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "score": 0
          }
        ],
      • "score": 0
      }
    ]
}

Health check

Responses

/healthz

Response samples

  • 200
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ok": true
}

Health check (versioned)

Responses

/v1/healthz

Response samples

  • 200
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ok": true
}

Start Google OAuth (redirects)

Initiates Google OAuth2 authorization with state and PKCE. Redirects to Google's consent screen.

Responses

/auth/google/start

Google OAuth callback

Handles Google OAuth2 authorization code exchange. On success, sets a session cookie and returns ok.

query Parameters
code
required
string
state
required
string

Responses

/auth/google/callback

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ok": true
}

Connect to notification stream (SSE)

Establishes a Server-Sent Events (SSE) connection to receive real-time notifications. Optional since parameter allows replaying missed notifications from a specific cursor (ULID).

query Parameters
since
string

The last seen notification ID to replay from.

Responses

/v1/notifications/stream

Register FCM device token

Registers a Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) token for the authenticated user.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
token
required
string

The FCM device token to register.

Responses

/v1/notifications/device-token

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "token": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true
}

Unregister FCM device token

Removes a Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) token for the authenticated user (e.g., on logout).

Request Body schema: application/json
required
token
required
string

The FCM device token to unregister.

Responses

/v1/notifications/device-token

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "token": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true
}

List active sessions

Returns a list of all active sessions for the authenticated user.

Responses

/v1/me/sessions

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "sessions": [
    • {
      • "sessionId": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "isCurrent": true
      }
    ]
}

Revoke session

Terminates a specific session (device) identified by sessionId.

path Parameters
sessionId
required
string^[a-f0-9]{16}$

Responses

/v1/me/sessions/{sessionId}

Bulk create conversations

Creates multiple conversations and their associated messages in a single request.

required
Array of objects (ChatThread)

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations/bulk

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
null

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
null

Create conversation

Creates a new conversation using client-provided UUID/ULID as id. Optionally accepts initial messages.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string
title
required
string
Array of objects (ChatMessage)

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "c_1234567890abcdef",
  • "title": "New Conversation",
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "id": "m_1111111111aaaaaa",
      • "role": "user",
      • "content": "Hello there",
      • "ts": "2025-01-01T12:00:00Z"
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "c_1234567890abcdef",
  • "title": "New Conversation",
  • "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T12:00:05Z",
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "id": "m_1111111111aaaaaa",
      • "role": "user",
      • "content": "Hello there",
      • "ts": "2025-01-01T12:00:00Z"
      }
    ]
}

List conversations

Returns a list of conversations. For performance reasons, the messages array in each conversation is empty. Use /test endpoint to get full message data.

query Parameters
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 50
cursor
string

ISO 8601 cursor

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": "c_1234567890abcdef",
      • "title": "New Conversation",
      • "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T12:00:05Z",
      • "messages": [ ]
      },
    • {
      • "id": "c_abcdef0123456789",
      • "title": "Another Thread",
      • "updatedAt": "2025-01-03T09:30:00Z",
      • "messages": [ ]
      }
    ],
  • "nextCursor": null
}

Delete all conversations

Deletes all conversations and messages for the authenticated user.

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "deletedCount": 0
}

[TEST] List conversations with full messages

Returns a list of conversations including the full messages array. Used for testing and debugging.

query Parameters
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 50
cursor
string

ISO 8601 cursor

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations/test

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "title": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "messages": [
        • {
          • "id": "string",
          • "role": "user",
          • "content": "string",
          • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "score": 0
          }
        ],
      • "score": 0
      }
    ],
  • "nextCursor": "string"
}

Get conversation

path Parameters
conversationId
required
string

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations/{conversationId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "c_1234567890abcdef",
  • "title": "New Conversation",
  • "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T12:00:05Z",
  • "messages": [
    • {

      • "ts": "2025-01-01T12:00:00Z"
      },
    • {
      • "id": "m_bbbbbbbbbbbb2222",

    ]

path Parameters
conversationId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json

title
string

Delete conversation

path Parameters
conversationId
required
string
query Parameters
permanent
boolean
Default: false

If true, performs a hard delete (irreversible). Otherwise, soft delete (recoverable via restore).

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations/{conversationId}

Response samples

  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Restore a deleted conversation

Restores a soft-deleted conversation. Also cascades to restore associated graph nodes and edges.

path Parameters
conversationId
required
string

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations/{conversationId}/restore

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "title": "string",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "role": "user",
      • "content": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "score": 0
      }
    ],
  • "score": 0
}

Request asynchronous chat transcript export

Creates a background job that serializes the conversation and messages to JSON, uploads to storage, and best-effort emails the export JSON to the authenticated user's profile email when SMTP is configured (CHAT_EXPORT_SMTP_USER, CHAT_EXPORT_SMTP_PASS; optional CHAT_EXPORT_EMAIL_FROM for the From header). Poll GET /v1/ai/chat-exports/{jobId} then download via GET /v1/ai/chat-exports/{jobId}/download when status is DONE.

path Parameters
conversationId
required
string

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations/{conversationId}/exports

Response samples

  • 202
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "jobId": "string",
  • "status": "PENDING",
  • "exportScope": "conversation"
}

Create message

path Parameters
conversationId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string

FE가 생성한 메시지 ID(UUID/ULID)

role
required
string
Enum: "user" "assistant" "system"
content
required
string
createdAt
required
string <date-time>
updatedAt
required
string <date-time>
deletedAt
string or null <date-time>
score
number

Search relevance score

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations/{conversationId}/messages

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "m_new_001",

}

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502

application/json

  • "role": "user",
  • "content": "What's the weather today?",
  • "ts": "2025-01-04T10:00:00Z"
}

path Parameters
conversationId
required
string
messageId

string
query Parameters
permanent
boolean
Default: false

If true, performs a hard delete (irreversible). Otherwise, soft delete (recoverable via restore).

/v1/ai/conversations/{conversationId}/messages/{messageId}

  • 401
  • 404
  • 502

application/problem+json

  • "status": 100,

  • "correlationId": "string",

Restore a deleted message

Restores a soft-deleted message. Also cascades to restore associated graph nodes.

path Parameters
conversationId
required
string
messageId
required
string

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations/{conversationId}/messages/{messageId}/restore

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "role": "user",
  • "content": "string",
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "score": 0
}

Send message to AI (Chat)

Sends a user message to the AI model. Supports streaming via SSE (Accept: text/event-stream). When using SSE, the server streams chunk, status, and result events. On non-streaming requests the response body contains the full AIChatResponseDto (201 Created). Supports file uploads for multimodal models (e.g., OpenAI Assistants, GPT-4o).

title: NEW_CONVERSATION 예약어 (웹 클라이언트 전용): 웹 클라이언트는 로컬 DB 부재로 인해 대화 시작 전 서버에 placeholder 제목으로 대화방을 먼저 생성해야 합니다. 이후 첫 메시지 전송 시 title: 'NEW_CONVERSATION'을 함께 보내면 서버가 메시지 내용을 기반으로 AI가 제목을 자동 생성하고 DB에 즉시 반영합니다. 생성된 제목은 SSE result 이벤트 또는 JSON 응답의 title 필드로 반환되므로 클라이언트는 UI 제목을 로딩 지연 없이 즉시 갱신할 수 있습니다. 모바일 앱은 로컬에서 제목을 추론하므로 이 예약어가 필요하지 않습니다.

path Parameters
conversationId
required
string
Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
id
string <uuid>
model
required
string
Enum: "openai" "claude" "gemini" "deepseek"
chatContent
required
string
modelName
string

Specific model variant name (e.g. gpt-4o)

title
string

예약어 NEW_CONVERSATION을 전달하면 서버가 대화 제목을 자동 생성하고 응답의 title 필드에 포함해 반환합니다. 다른 값은 무시됩니다. 웹 클라이언트 전용 경로이며, 모바일에서는 사용 불필요합니다.

files
Array of strings <binary> [ items <binary > ]

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations/{conversationId}/chat

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 502
  • 504
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "string",
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "role": "user",
      • "content": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "score": 0
      }
    ]
}

Regenerate AI response

Permanently deletes the last AI response in the conversation and generates a new one. Supports streaming via SSE (Accept: text/event-stream).

path Parameters
conversationId
required
string
Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
model
required
string
Enum: "openai" "claude" "gemini" "deepseek"
modelName
string
files
Array of strings <binary> [ items <binary > ]

Responses

/v1/ai/conversations/{conversationId}/chat/retry

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 502
  • 504
Content type
application/json
{
  • "title": "string",
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "role": "user",
      • "content": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "score": 0
      }
    ]
}

path Parameters
jobId
required
string

/v1/ai/chat-exports/{jobId}

  • 401
  • 404

  • "status": "PENDING",

  • "conversationId": "string",
  • "downloadUrl": "http://example.com",
  • "errorMessage": "string"

Available only when job status is DONE. Returns JSON as a downloadable attachment.

path Parameters
jobId
required
string

Responses

/v1/ai/chat-exports/{jobId}/download

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{ }

      • "type": "string",
      • "url": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "mimeType": "string",
      • "size": 0
      }
    ]
}

key

Responses

/auth/logout

Response samples

  • 401
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,

Create or update a graph node

Inserts a new node or updates an existing one based on its ID.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
integer

The integer ID of the node, unique per user.

userId
required
string non-empty

The server-internal user identifier.

origId
required
string non-empty

The original conversation ID this node refers to.

label
string [ 1 .. 200 ] characters

The editor-visible node label.

summary
string <= 2000 characters

Optional node summary.

object

Custom node metadata.

nodeTitle
string non-empty

Legacy generated node title.

clusterId
required
string non-empty

The ID of the cluster this node belongs to.

clusterName
required
string non-empty

The name of the cluster this node belongs to.

required
string or null

The timestamp of the conversation (ISO 8601) or null.

numMessages
required
integer >= 0

The number of messages or sections included in this node.

sourceType
string
Enum: "chat" "markdown" "notion"

The source type of the node data.

createdAt
string <date-time>

Creation timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

updatedAt
string <date-time>

Update timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

deletedAt
string <date-time>

Soft-delete timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

Responses

/v1/graph/nodes

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "userId": "string",
  • "origId": "string",
  • "label": "string",
  • "summary": "string",
  • "metadata": { },
  • "nodeTitle": "string",
  • "clusterId": "string",
  • "clusterName": "string",
  • "timestamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "numMessages": 0,
  • "sourceType": "chat",
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 101,
  • "userId": "u_1234567890",
  • "origId": "c_abcdef123456",
  • "clusterId": "cl_9876543210",
  • "clusterName": "Project Alpha",
  • "timestamp": "2025-01-01T12:00:00Z",
  • "numMessages": 5,
  • "sourceType": "chat",
  • "createdAt": "2025-01-01T12:00:00Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T12:00:00Z"
}

List all graph nodes for the user

Retrieves a list of all graph nodes associated with the authenticated user.

Responses

/v1/graph/nodes

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
[
  • {

    },

    }
]

Get a specific graph node

path Parameters
nodeId
required
integer

Responses

/v1/graph/nodes/{nodeId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
Content type

Delete a graph node and its connected edges

path Parameters
nodeId
required
integer
query Parameters
permanent
boolean
Default: false

If true, performs a hard delete. Otherwise, soft delete.

Responses

/v1/graph/nodes/{nodeId}/cascade

Response samples

  • 401
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,

  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]

Create or update a graph edge

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
string non-empty

The unique identifier for the edge.

userId
required
string non-empty

The server-internal user identifier.

source
required
integer

The ID of the source node.

target
required
integer

The ID of the target node.

weight
required
number [ 0 .. 1 ]

The weight of the edge (0 to 1).

type
required
string
Enum: "hard" "insight"

The type of the edge.

relationType
string [ 1 .. 100 ] characters

User-facing relation type, normalized to UPPER_SNAKE_CASE by editor APIs.

relation
string <= 200 characters

Display label for the relation.

object

Custom edge properties.

intraCluster
required
boolean

Whether the edge connects nodes within the same cluster.

createdAt
string <date-time>

Creation timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

updatedAt
string <date-time>

Update timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

deletedAt
string <date-time>

Soft-delete timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

Responses

/v1/graph/edges

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "userId": "string",
  • "source": 0,
  • "target": 0,
  • "weight": 1,
  • "type": "hard",
  • "relationType": "string",
  • "relation": "string",
  • "properties": { },
  • "intraCluster": true,
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "e_1234567890",
  • "userId": "u_1234567890",
  • "source": 101,
  • "target": 102,
  • "weight": 0.85,
  • "type": "insight",
  • "intraCluster": true,
  • "createdAt": "2025-01-02T15:00:00Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2025-01-02T15:00:00Z"
}

Create or update a graph cluster

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string non-empty

The unique identifier for the cluster.

userId
required
string non-empty

The server-internal user identifier.

name
required
string non-empty

The name of the cluster.

description
required
string <= 2000 characters

A description of the cluster.

size
required
integer >= 0

The number of nodes in the cluster.

themes
required
Array of strings <= 10 items [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ]

Core themes of the cluster.

createdAt
string <date-time>

Creation timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

updatedAt
string <date-time>

Update timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

deletedAt
string <date-time>

Soft-delete timestamp (ISO 8601 UTC).

Responses

/v1/graph/clusters

Request samples

Content type
application/json

    • "string"

  • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json

  • "size": 15,

required

Pull changes from server

Retrieves changes (conversations, messages, notes, folders) that occurred after the specified since timestamp.

query Parameters
since
string <date-time>

ISO 8601 timestamp. If omitted, returns all data.

Responses

/v1/sync/pull

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "conversations": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "title": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "messages": [
        • {
          • "id": "string",
          • "role": "user",
          • "content": "string",
          • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "score": 0
          }
        ],
      • "score": 0
      }
    ],
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "role": "user",
      • "content": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "score": 0
      }
    ],
  • "notes": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "title": "string",
      • "content": "string",
      • "folderId": "5b6379a4-2a6c-4085-b184-45838a3b8e7e",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "score": 0
      }
    ],
  • "folders": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "parentId": "70850378-7d3c-4f45-91b7-942d4dfbbd43",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Push changes to server

Applies client-side changes (creates/updates/deletes) to the server. Uses Last-Write-Wins (LWW) based on updatedAt.

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (ChatThread)
Array of objects (ChatMessage)
Array of objects (Note)
Array of objects (Folder)

Responses

/v1/sync/push

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "conversations": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "title": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "messages": [
        • {
          • "id": "string",
          • "role": "user",
          • "content": "string",
          • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "score": 0
          }
        ],
      • "score": 0
      }
    ],
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "role": "user",
      • "content": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "score": 0,
      • "conversationId": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "notes": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "title": "string",
      • "content": "string",
      • "folderId": "5b6379a4-2a6c-4085-b184-45838a3b8e7e",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "score": 0
      }
    ],
  • "folders": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "name": "string",
      • "parentId": "70850378-7d3c-4f45-91b7-942d4dfbbd43",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

  • "success": true

Create a note

Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
string <uuid>
title
required
string
content
required
string
folderId
string <uuid>

Responses

/v1/notes

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",

  • "content": "string",
  • "folderId": "5b6379a4-2a6c-4085-b184-45838a3b8e7e"
}

Generate graph from text (Async)

Starts an asynchronous background task to generate a graph from the user's conversation history. Returns a task ID.

Request Body schema: application/json
optional

Options for graph generation.

includeSummary
boolean

Whether to also generate a graph summary (3-mode pipeline).

Responses

/v1/graph-ai/generate

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "includeSummary": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 202
  • 401
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string"
}

Request graph summary generation

Starts an asynchronous background task to generate a summary of the user's graph.

Responses

/v1/graph-ai/summary

Response samples

  • 202
  • 401
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string",
  • "taskId": "string",
  • "status": "string"
}

Get graph summary

Retrieves the generated summary and insights for the user's graph. If no summary has been generated yet, returns a default object with empty arrays (not a 404).

Responses

/v1/graph-ai/summary

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "overview": {
    • "total_conversations": 0,
    • "total_notes": 0,
    • "total_notions": 0,
    • "time_span": "string",
    • "primary_interests": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "conversation_style": "string",
    • "most_active_period": "string",
    • "summary_text": "string"
    },
  • "clusters": [
    • {
      • "cluster_id": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "size": 0,
      • "density": 0,
      • "centrality": 0,
      • "recency": "string",
      • "top_keywords": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "key_themes": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "common_question_types": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "insight_text": "string",
      • "notable_conversations": [
        • "string"
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "patterns": [
    • {
      • "pattern_type": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "evidence": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "significance": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "connections": [
    • {
      • "source_cluster": "string",
      • "target_cluster": "string",
      • "connection_strength": 0,
      • "bridge_keywords": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "description": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "recommendations": [
    • {
      • "type": "string",
      • "title": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "related_nodes": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "priority": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "generated_at": "string",
  • "detail_level": "string"
}

Microscope

List all user workspaces

Responses

/v1/microscope

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 502
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "_id": "group_123",
    • "userId": "user_456",
    • "name": "Project A",
    • "documents": [
      • {
        • "id": "doc_789",
        • "s3Key": "microscope/user_456/group_123/doc_789_file.pdf",
        • "fileName": "file.pdf",
        • "status": "COMPLETED",
        • "nodeId": "conv_123",
        • "nodeType": "conversation",
        • "sourceId": "source_abc",
        • "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
        • "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
        }
      ],
    • "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
    }
]

Create new workspace by ingesting a node (note or conversation)

Starts an asynchronous Ingest pipeline that extracts entities and relations from the given note or conversation and builds a Microscope knowledge graph workspace. The response returns immediately with workspace metadata; use GET /v1/microscope/:id to poll for COMPLETED status.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
nodeId
required
string

ID of the note or conversation to ingest

nodeType
required
string
Enum: "note" "conversation"

Type of the source node

schemaName
string

Optional custom entity extraction schema name

Responses

/v1/microscope/nodes/ingest

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "nodeId": "string",
  • "nodeType": "note",
  • "schemaName": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "_id": "group_123",
  • "userId": "user_456",
  • "name": "Project A",
  • "documents": [
    • {
      • "id": "doc_789",
      • "s3Key": "microscope/user_456/group_123/doc_789_file.pdf",
      • "fileName": "file.pdf",
      • "status": "COMPLETED",
      • "nodeId": "conv_123",
      • "nodeType": "conversation",
      • "sourceId": "source_abc",
      • "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
      }
    ],
  • "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
}

Get latest ingest workspace by node ID

Returns the workspace containing the most recently created ingest Document for the given nodeId. Sorted by documents.createdAt DESC — unlike updatedAt-based sorting, this guarantees that a recently completed old ingest does not shadow an in-progress newer ingest request. Use this endpoint to track ingest status (PROCESSING / COMPLETED / FAILED) without storing the workspace ID returned by POST /v1/microscope/nodes/ingest. Find the relevant Document via workspace.documents.find(d => d.nodeId === nodeId).

path Parameters
nodeId
required
string

Note or Conversation ID used as the ingest source

Responses

/v1/microscope/nodes/{nodeId}/latest-workspace

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "_id": "group_123",
  • "userId": "user_456",
  • "name": "Project A",
  • "documents": [
    • {
      • "id": "doc_789",
      • "s3Key": "microscope/user_456/group_123/doc_789_file.pdf",
      • "fileName": "file.pdf",
      • "status": "COMPLETED",
      • "nodeId": "conv_123",
      • "nodeType": "conversation",
      • "sourceId": "source_abc",
      • "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
      }
    ],
  • "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
}

groupId
required
string

/v1/microscope/{groupId}

AI

query Parameters
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 50
cursor
string

ISO 8601 cursor

/v1/ai/conversations/trash

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "title": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "messages": [
        • {
          • "id": "string",
          • "role": "user",
          • "content": "string",
          • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "score": 0
          }
        ],
      • "score": 0
      }
    ],
  • "nextCursor": "string"
}

Graph

Search similar graph nodes using vector

Performs a similarity search in ChromaDB using the provided query vector and enriches results with full node data from MongoDB.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
queryVector
required
Array of numbers

The embedding vector to search with.

limit
integer
Default: 5

Maximum number of results to return.

Responses

/v1/graph/search

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "queryVector": [
    • 0
    ],
  • "limit": 5
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "node": {
      • "id": 0,
      • "userId": "string",
      • "origId": "string",
      • "label": "string",
      • "summary": "string",
      • "metadata": { },
      • "nodeTitle": "string",
      • "clusterId": "string",
      • "clusterName": "string",
      • "timestamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "numMessages": 0,
      • "sourceType": "chat",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "deletedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      },
    • "score": 0
    }
]

Feedback

Submit feedback

사용자 피드백을 제출한다. 파일 첨부 시 multipart/form-data로 전송하며, 첨부 없이 application/json으로도 호출 가능하다. 인증 불필요.

Request Body schema:
required
category
required
string [ 1 .. 191 ] characters
userName
string or null <= 191 characters
userEmail
string or null <email> <= 191 characters
title
required
string [ 1 .. 1000 ] characters
content
required
string [ 1 .. 10000 ] characters
files
Array of strings <binary> [ items <binary > ]

Responses

/v1/feedback

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
No sample

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "feedback": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
    • "category": "string",
    • "userName": "string",
    • "userEmail": "string",
    • "title": "string",
    • "content": "string",
    • "status": "UNREAD",
    • "attachments": { },
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

List feedbacks

커서 기반 페이지네이션으로 피드백 목록을 조회한다.

query Parameters
limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
cursor
string

이전 응답의 nextCursor 값

Responses

/v1/feedback

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "feedbacks": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
      • "category": "string",
      • "userName": "string",
      • "userEmail": "string",
      • "title": "string",
      • "content": "string",
      • "status": "UNREAD",
      • "attachments": { },
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "nextCursor": "string"
}

Get feedback by ID

path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Responses

/v1/feedback/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "feedback": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
    • "category": "string",
    • "userName": "string",
    • "userEmail": "string",
    • "title": "string",
    • "content": "string",
    • "status": "UNREAD",
    • "attachments": { },
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Delete feedback

path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>

Responses

/v1/feedback/{id}

Response samples

  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Update feedback status

path Parameters
id
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
status
required
string
Enum: "UNREAD" "READ" "IN_PROGRESS" "DONE"

Responses

/v1/feedback/{id}/status

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "UNREAD"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 404
  • 502
Content type
application/json
{
  • "feedback": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
    • "category": "string",
    • "userName": "string",
    • "userEmail": "string",
    • "title": "string",
    • "content": "string",
    • "status": "UNREAD",
    • "attachments": { },
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Files

Download feedback attachment

피드백 첨부 파일을 S3에서 직접 서빙한다. key는 피드백 응답의 attachments[].url 값이다. FE에서 {domain}/{url} 형태로 이미지를 바로 렌더링할 수 있다.

path Parameters
key
required
string

파일명 (예:uuid-image.png)

Responses

/feedback-files/{key}

Response samples

  • 404
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Download chat attachment

AI 채팅 첨부 파일을 S3에서 직접 서빙한다.

path Parameters
key
required
string

Responses

/chat-files/{key}

Response samples

  • 404
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}

Download SDK-uploaded file

SDK를 통해 업로드된 파일을 S3에서 직접 서빙한다.

path Parameters
key
required
string

Responses

/sdk-files/{key}

Response samples

  • 404
Content type
application/problem+json
{
  • "type": "http://example.com",
  • "title": "string",
  • "status": 100,
  • "detail": "string",
  • "instance": "string",
  • "correlationId": "string",
  • "retryable": true,
  • "errors": [
    • { }
    ]
}
